title: helichrysum transmontanum
intro: Helichrysum transmontanum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum transmontanum include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum transmontanum are available in various forms, such as essential oil, tincture, and topical creams, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce pain, and alleviate stress.
